channel_news.summary: While still in early stages, Target's efforts to revitalize the business appear to be paying off. The retailer reported its first quarter of net sales growth after at least six quarters of year-over-year declines.

channel_news.title: Brands are finally bringing resale into stores
channel_news.summary: In the last five years, dozens of apparel brands have set up online resale sites. Now, more players like Pacsun and Faherty are bringing secondhand into stores, too.

channel_news.title: Brands Briefing: Harry’s turns to a drop model for its body wash to acquire new customers
channel_news.summary: Harry's, best known for its razors, is turning to limited-edition body washes to resonate with a younger consumer.

channel_news.title: TikTok Shop says sales from U.S. small businesses climbed 66% in 2025
channel_news.summary: TikTok Shop says it's continuing to drive rapid growth for small businesses, even as bigger brands swarm the platform.

channel_news.title: Everlane’s sale to Shein is another nail in the coffin for millennial DTC brands
channel_news.summary: One of the first DTC darlings of the 2010s, Everlane has sold to Shein for a reported $100 million after years of struggling to grow. Combined with Allbirds' fire sale earlier this year, it's a nail in the coffin for early, venture-backed DTC darlings.

channel_news.title: U.S. CPG manufacturers are sitting on excess capacity, which could be a boon for brands
channel_news.summary: New data from Keychain shows about 1 in 10 CPG factories is running more than half empty, and about 1 in 3 has at least 31% or more unused production capacity.

channel_news.title: How FlutterHabit uses its 46,000-member Facebook group for product development
channel_news.summary: FlutterHabit turned its private Facebook group into a testing ground for products, marketing and customer feedback.

channel_news.title: Joy Mangano calls TV shopping her ‘best-kept secret’ as she uses old-school infomercials to grow her new brand, CleanBoss
channel_news.summary: Joy Mangano, inventor of the MiracleMop, is seeing sales spike for her new brand, CleanBoss, thanks to the nostalgic direct-response TV ads it runs across cable channels. "TV shopping is not just my history, it's my best-kept secret," Mangano told Modern Retail.

channel_news.summary: Matt Maddox has been president and will take over as chief executive to run day-to-day op
